roa.docketEntryComment: DA'S OPP TO PC1538,5 MOTION FILED
DA MOT TO CONT PRELIM HRNG FILED TODAY IN RM 101DA MOT TO AMEND COMPLAINT FILED TODAY IN RM 101
NTC MOT TO SUPPRESS PUR 1538,5FILED BY DEFT

/X:DEFENSE ATTORNEY IS NOT PRESENT/CAL:FOP COMPLETION/CTORD: MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: DEFENDANT SHALL COMPLETE FOP PROGRAM AS ORDERED AND PER PLEA FORM  IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE NEW POLICY AND PROCESS CHANGE IN EFFECT AS OF AUGUST 29, 2011  /

/CAL:SENTENCING/TWS/CH3:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 5D/CTS:1/X:BALANCE OF SENTENCE TOBE SERVED THROUGH SWAP,/FOP1:18 MONTHS/LCHEM/LVAL/VF1/X:DEFENDANT SHALLPAY A BASE FINE OF $460 PLUS $1,380 IN ASSESSMENTS  FOR A FINE AMOUNT OF $1,840,/MPROBFINE/SECFEE40/ICNA/CITE/EMAT/1463ALC/X:UPON 18 MONTHS SUCCESSFUL PROBATION AND COMPLETION OF FOP PROGRAM DEFENDANT MAY PETITION FOR MODIFICATION TO COURT PROBATION,/ /COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/BE/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU101 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/CONTD:10-06-11 PROOF OF FOP ENROLLMENT/DOPU:WAIVED BY BY PROOF OF ENROLLMENT PRIOR TO COURT DATE,/  /CONTD:04-08-13 PROOF OFFOP COMPLETION/DOPU:WAIVED BY BY PROOF OF COMPLETION PRIOR TO COURT DATE,/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING AND DEFENSE MOTION TO SUPPRESS/X:TODAY'S PRELIMINARY HEARING & MOTION TO SUPPRESS VACATED,/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST &CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:003/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/DISM3/
CONTD PROC RE BW STAY;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X:NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO 06-20-11,/X:BAIL SET AT $25,000/X:BAIL FORFEITURE STAYED,/

/CAL:PD MOTION TO SUPPRESS, PRELIM HRG & MOT CONTINUE HRG/X:PD'S MOTION TOCONTINUE IS GRANTED,/X:DA'S MOTION TO AMEND COMPLAINT IS GRANTED/X:AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED AND SERVED IN OPEN COURT,/FAWC/DEFTARR1/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HRG & MOTION TO SUPPRESS/DOP/
/CAL:FOP ENROLLMENT/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: INACCORDENCE WITH COURT POLICY   /
/CAL:PROC RE BENCH WARRANT STAY FTA PRELIM HRG ON 06-07-11/BWSTAY:06-07-11/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING & MOTION TO SUPPRESS/DOP/
/CAL:DA MOTION TO AMEND COMPLAINT/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR, MOTION WAS GRANTED 05-03-11/
